project_context.name: DanceTrack
project_context.description: Mobile dance management app for trainers to manage groups, students, attendance, and rewards.
project_context.environment: Expo React Native (or Mobile-First React PWA) using Tailwind / NativeWind

layout_spacing.general: Mobile-first layout. Content should be constrained and scrollable.

group_card.style: bg-[#ffffff] rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-[#f0e1e5] p-4 flex flex-row items-center gap-4
group_card.features: Large circular initial with dynamic background color (from secondary/accents), bold DM Serif Display heading for group name, small DM Sans text for day/time.

student_avatar.style: rounded-full w-12 h-12 object-cover border-2 border-[#ffffff] shadow-sm relative
student_avatar.features: Use actual photo if available, fallback to default avatar. Display the current reward level emoji (🌱🌿🍃🍀🌼🌻🐝🐞🐛🦋) as an absolute positioned badge at the bottom-right corner.

bottom_sheet_modal.features: Used for quick actions like adding a student, marking attendance, or editing group details.

navigation.style: bg-[#ffffff] border-t border-[#f0e1e5] pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center

awards.description: 3D gold trophy for the Top Achievers screen

status_icons.description: 3D Disco ball for Present status fallback
3D Palm tree for Excused status fallback

animations.sheet_entrance: slide-up from bottom with spring physics

testing.attributes: All touchable elements, buttons, inputs, and list items MUST have data-testid in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React/Tailwind syntax mapping if building a web-first Expo app or native primitives for purely React Native.
Prioritize smooth touch interactions. Use scrollable views for long lists.
Implement the Workspace selector as a prominent dropdown in the top header.
Avoid harsh shadows; use soft, diffuse drop shadows for cards to fit the pastel theme.
Use the exact hex codes requested: Background #fef5f5, Surfaces #ffffff, Text #6b4e5c, Primary #d4719d.
Do not use .tsx files if the environment only supports .js.
Include 'data-testid' on interactive elements for automated testing.
